name: adjudant
description: Obsidian vault editor and project initializer. One command, /adjudant, with ten verbs (connect, port, sync, check, sitrep, tidy, ramasse, dream, draw, board) — each backed by a Python helper that follows the .claude/adjudant breadcrumb automatically. Locked three-tier cleanup model: tidy = surface mechanical (routine), ramasse = deep structural (sparing), dream = content/knowledge/memory refresh (semantic, judgment-heavy — 10-category comparator catalog). The PreCompact hook is mechanical-only (no model calls, 5s budget) and writes a handoff freshness header — traffic light, real-activity age, NEXT, and a stale flag when session activity is newer than the handoff — plus an enriched pause tombstone carrying the NEXT action. v0.7.1 shares that freshness layer (scripts/_handoff_freshness.py) with the /adjudant sync verb so manual and auto-compaction syncs produce identical handoffs. v0.7.2 hardens the scanners so they no longer false-positive on a plugin's own templates/ scaffolds (exempt from naming, stub, and index-gap checks). v0.7.3 adds session_id / source_session traceability across session notes and authored content. v0.8.0 adds the board verb — a self-hosted, single-file work-order kanban (drag-to-move, disk-persisted via the File System Access API), a new standard project surface that any adjudant project can scaffold, seeded from that project's tasks/. v0.9.0 makes board multi-project: scaffold any project by slug (--project) or every project at once (--all), discovered by filesystem truth; per-board state namespacing keeps a portfolio of boards independent, and a refresh-without-clobber merge preserves the columns you dragged cards into when re-seeding from tasks/. v0.10.0 adds the sitrep verb — an ELI5 orientation briefing (where we were, what's done, where the vault is, where best to start) rendered from a read-only sitrep.py scan that reuses the freshness + check primitives; for re-orienting fast after a break, complementing check's schema-compliance report. Cross-machine portable via vault_name fallback resolution. Enforces vault standards; pairs with hookify and Gemineye.
